title: Today the Savior calls
publicDomainBasis: Samuel Francis Smith (1808–1895), Lowell Mason (1792–1872). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
Today the Savior calls;
Ye wand’rers come:
O ye benighted souls!
Why longer roam?

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Today the Savior calls;
O hear Him now!
Before your day is gone,
To Jesus bow.

sections.label: Verse 3
Verse 4
